hooks.prompt: Enforce templates/vault AGENTS.md ownership and invariants. Hook input: $ARGUMENTS. Inspect tool_input.file_path (and content). DENY mutations under .git/ or .obsidian/. DENY modifying existing source content under raw/ (any non-.gitkeep write, or overwriting a non-empty source). ALLOW first-time setup creating a missing raw/**/.gitkeep placeholder with empty/placeholder content only. DENY delete/rename/merge/split of canonical wiki pages unless explicitly approved. DENY changes to AGENTS.md, meta/schema.md, meta/ontology.md, or meta/policies.md unless explicit governance or first-time setup creating a missing file without overwrite. ALLOW ordinary wiki/ and meta ledger/report/state/index/log updates. Deny with a concise reason.

Enforce templates/vault AGENTS.md ownership and invariants. Hook input: $ARGUMENTS. Inspect tool_input.command. ALLOW immediately when the command is read-only git inspection only (status, diff, log, rev-parse, show) with no file redirects/writes. DENY commands that create/modify/move/delete under .git/ or .obsidian/, or that modify raw/ source content (ALLOW only first-time setup creating missing raw/**/.gitkeep placeholders). DENY shell-based wiki delete/rename/merge/overwrite and governance-file edits unless explicit governance or first-time setup of a missing file. Deny with a concise reason.

Hook input: $ARGUMENTS. Allow stop for read-only/non-mutation turns (query, status, lint report-only, research, clarification) when the user question is answered. Allow setup stop when a create/preserve/conflict manifest is present. For mutation workflows (ingest, repair, synthesize, maintain): if the run early-stopped with ledger needs-review/failed and no wiki integration was attempted, allow stop when that outcome, ledger/log updates, and unresolved items are reported (verification may be N/A). Otherwise require scope, sources processed (or none), files changed, independent verification result, unresolved review items, and ledger/log/automation-state updates as applicable. Identify missing evidence when blocking.
